prompt_text: Open source or affordable sales engagement tools instead of Instantly
response:
# Open Source & Affordable Sales Engagement Alternatives to Instantly

## **Open Source Options**

### **Mautic**
- Free marketing automation platform
- Email campaigns, lead scoring, contact management
- Self-hosted (your server)
- Steep learning curve but powerful
- https://www.mautic.org

### **EspoCRM**
- Open-source CRM with email capabilities
- Contact/lead management, pipelines, automation
- Self-hosted
- Good community support
- https://www.espocrm.com

### **Odoo**
- Modular open-source suite
- CRM, email, pipelines, reporting
- Free Community Edition (self-hosted)
- Can get complex but very comprehensive
- https://www.odoo.com

---

## **Budget-Friendly Commercial Tools**

### **HubSpot Free CRM**
- $0 for basic CRM & email
- Good for small teams starting out
- Limited automation
- Strong feature set for the price

### **Brevo (formerly Sendinblue)**
- Email + SMS + basic CRM
- Free up to 300 contacts
- ~$20-100/month for paid plans
- Decent automation features

### **Close**
- $29-99/month
- Built for sales teams
- Call tracking, email, pipelines
- No contact limits (unlike many tools)

### **Pipedrive**
- $14-99/month per user
- Visual pipeline management
- Basic email integration
- Very intuitive UI

### **Mailchimp**
- Free for basic email + small CRM
- Best for smaller outreach volumes
- ~$20-300/month for features

---

## **Hybrid Approach**

Many teams combine:
- **Free CRM** (HubSpot/Odoo) + **Email tool** (Brevo/Mailchimp)
- **Self-hosted** (Mautic) + **Gmail/Outlook** for sending

**What's your budget & team size?** That would help narrow this down.
